docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. [CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED, UNCLAIMED, TO THE COURT ON 04-10-23] FILED BY PLAINTIFF YU, LI
DECLARATION (UPDATING DEFENDANT'S CURRENT ADDRESS) FILED BY DEFENDANT COWBOY TOWING
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YU, LI

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-12-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LI YU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COWBOY TOWING IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, AMENDING DEFENDANT'S AGENT OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF YU, LI
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) HAROLD WYAN JR. (PRESIDENT/OWNER) FILED BY DEFENDANT COWBOY TOWING

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2023 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT'S CALENDAR TO OCT-06-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LI YU IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY MANDARIN-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER HWA SHING (SHANNON) KWEI (#301159). DEFENDANT COWBOY TOWING IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY HAROLD WYAN JR., PRESIDENT/OWNER. PARTIES ARE INFORMED THIS MATTER MUST BE CONTINUED BECAUSE THE PRO TEM JUDGE SCHEDULED FOR TODAY HAS FALLEN ILL. EACH SIDE INFORMS THE OTHER SIDE OF THEIR INTENT TO REQUEST TO APPEAR AT NEXT DATE VIA ZOOM, AND EXCHANGED WITH EACH OTHER COPIES OF EACH OTHER'S EXHIBITS THEY HAVE AT THIS TIME. IF PARTIES' INTEND ON PRESENTING ANY OTHER EXHIBITS AT THE NEXT DATE, THEY MUST DELIVER COPIES OF THOSE EXHIBITS TO EACH OTHER AND TO THE COURT. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DEFENDANT GRANTED**
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2023 - JUDGMENT.
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-14-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-12-2023 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [AGENT FOR SERVICE: HAROLD E. WYAN JR] SERVED JUL-17-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COWBOY TOWING
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER FILED BY YU, LI COWBOY TOWING
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,800.00 [AMENDING DEFENDANT'S AGENT OF SERVICE, PRIOR TO SERVICE OF CLAIM] FILED BY YU, LI AS TO DEFENDANT COWBOY TOWING
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT COWBOY TOWING

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ALLYSYN OVERTON. PLAINTIFF LI YU IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY PROVISIONALLY-CERTIFIED MANDARIN COURT INTERPRETER JEFFREY DINN. DEFENDANT COWBOY TOWING IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY HAROLD WYAN JR. (PRESIDENT/OWNER) VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSYN OVERTON; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YU, LI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COWBOY TOWING DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $0. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO MEET HER BURDEN OF PROOF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YU, LI AS TO DEFENDANT COWBOY TOWING
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE APR-10-2023 SC-100 MAIL TO DEFENDANT(ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER UNCLAIMED UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-14-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-11-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF YU LI IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER AIDONG NI. DEFENDANT COWBOY TOWING IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTOPHER HITE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT COWBOY TOWING
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) [HEARING: 10/06/23 AT 8:30AM] (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YU, LI
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,800.00 FILED BY YU, LI AS TO DEFENDANT COWBOY TOWING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE: HAROLD E. WYAN JR.] FILED BY PLAINTIFF YU, LI AS TO DEFENDANT COWBOY TOWING
